title: evax nivea
intro: Evax nivea, also known as annual knawel, is a flowering plant species belonging to the genus Evax in the daisy family (Asteraceae). Evax nivea has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems. Evax nivea can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
